scripts.build: npm run build -w @stellarmesh/shared && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/payment-router && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/facilitator && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/api && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/mcp-server && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/demo-search-service && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/demo-weather-service && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/demo-inference-service && npm run build -w @stellarmesh/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/shared && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/payment-router && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/facilitator && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/api && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/mcp-server && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/demo-search-service && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/demo-weather-service && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/demo-inference-service && npm run typecheck -w @stellarmesh/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @stellarmesh/shared && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/payment-router && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/facilitator && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/api && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/mcp-server && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/demo-search-service && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/demo-weather-service && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/demo-inference-service && npm run test -w @stellarmesh/dashboard
